goal: Create a push-stream eligibility document that defines file-level evaluation rules and lists current unpushed local changes as whitelist/hold/reject without committing or pushing.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay/runtime logic files for this task.
Only produce documentation and task metadata for review.
Use current repository working tree as the only inspection source.
deliverables: A standards document describing push eligibility criteria and review workflow.
A current unpushed-file classification list (whitelist/hold/reject) with reasons.
